_comment: Bootstrap allow-list for first-install user profile auto-fetch. When the app installs for the first time, it calls GET /api/auth/bootstrap which returns this list. If the user-entered (or device-detected) email matches an entry here, the app auto-creates a UserProfile with the role/name/mobile/designation pre-populated — no manual form fill needed. To add a new admin/cadre/SAAO, append an entry below and redeploy. To revoke, remove the entry (the user's existing IndexedDB profile remains, but server-side auth will reject them).

_roles.admin: Full access — Dashboard, all submissions, user management, seed sync
_roles.cadre: Monitoring officer — own submissions + view all submissions in assigned upazila
_roles.officer: SAAO — own submissions + view submissions in assigned block
_roles.citizen: Self-submission only — no access to others' data

users.name: মনিরুজ্জামান
users.notes: Project lead / repo owner. Replace with real DAE email before production deploy.
District DDA — fallback admin. Replace with real email before deploy.
Upazila Agriculture Officer, Kurigram Sadar — monitoring officer cadre.
